combined_energy.content: When the manifesting power of Tone 10 meets the legal authority of Tz'i', we experience a day of 'Community Law.' 10 Tz'i' is the energy of justice being served in the village square. It is a day where truth comes to light and order is restored through collaboration. If you have legal matters pending, this is a powerful day for resolution. The energy supports fairness, loyalty, and the upholding of agreements. It is also a day to manifest your own internal code of ethics—to walk your talk in a way that others can see. The dog (Tz'i') protects the community (10). Be a loyal friend today; stand up for those who cannot stand up for themselves. The energy is solid and reliable. It reminds us that spiritual law is not abstract; it is manifested in how we treat each other every single day.
notes: Review contracts or legal documents with a clear eye.
Stand up for a friend or a cause; show your loyalty.
Bring a project to completion that involves rules or structure.
Trust your moral compass; it is pointing true north today.
Collaborate with others to create a fairer system.

days.horoscope:
Today brings a clear, grounded truthfulness. You may feel a strong instinct to straighten your posture, tidy your space, clarify your intentions, or speak honestly in a way you’ve been avoiding.

This is not a day for dramatic confessions. It is a day for alignment. For removing the small lies you tell yourself out of convenience or habit. For choosing the path that is clean over the one that is merely easy.

When you act from integrity today, things fall into place with surprising ease. Trust the part of you that knows what’s right—not morally, but energetically. Truth feels steady. Let it guide you.
days.affirmation: I stand in my truth with clarity and kindness, and I let my actions reflect the person I choose to be.
days.meditation:
Sit or stand with a long spine. Close your eyes and imagine the lake before you, perfectly reflective.

On the surface, see lines of light forming a simple map—paths, arcs, intersections. Let the image shift until one path brightens. Follow it gently in your mind. Notice how it feels in your body: does it bring steadiness, calm, relief?

Now place a hand on your heart and ask inwardly: “What truth wants to be lived today?”

You don’t need a sentence. Even a sensation or a single word is enough.

Offer a quiet thanks to the keepers of truth, justice, and integrity. Then open your eyes and take one grounded step into the day with that guidance in mind.

birthday.title: The Loyal Leader
birthday.content:
To be born on 10 Tz'i' is to be a pillar of justice and a faithful companion. You are the 'Manifested Guide'—someone who embodies the law of love and loyalty in a tangible way. You have a strong sense of responsibility to your community and are likely the person everyone trusts to do the right thing. You are a natural leader, not through force, but through your unwavering reliability. People know that if you say you will do something, it is as good as done (10).

Your life path is one of upholding the truth. You may be drawn to law, administration, or social justice work. You have a 'detective' mind that seeks to uncover the facts and restore order. Your challenge is to ensure that your love for the law does not turn into rigidity or judgment of those who are less disciplined. Remember that the highest law is unconditional love. You are here to protect the pack and guide us toward the light.
birthday.image_prompt: Square image. A mystical stone carving of the Mayan glyph for Tz'i' (Dog/Staff) glowing with internal white and silver light against a dark obsidian background. Hovering directly above the glyph is the Mayan numeral 10: two glowing golden bars arranged horizontally. The style is ancient, tactile, and magical, emphasizing the texture of the stone and the luminescence of the symbols. No English text.

days.chapter:
The path feels lighter today, almost playful.

There’s a quickness in your step that you didn’t choose—something in the air tugs at you with quiet excitement, as if the forest can hardly wait for you to arrive. Sunlight flickers through the leaves in weaving patterns, braiding shadow and glow into shifting designs that dance across your hands.

By the time you reach the lake, the world is already in motion.

Threads of light rise from the water—hundreds of them, thin and shimmering, drifting upward like strands of silk caught in a rising breeze. Some spiral gently, some arc in sweeping curves, some twist together before drifting apart again.

They do not feel random.

You step closer, and the threads react, brightening, gathering, rearranging themselves around you like friendly, curious companions. The lake beneath them is calm, but the air above it is alive, pulsing with creative electricity.

Without thinking, you lift your hand.

A thread drifts close and wraps softly around your fingers—warm, weightless, impossibly delicate. The moment it touches you, something inside you sharpens: a memory, a vision, a forgotten idea, a half-formed dream. Another thread drifts close, brushing your arm with a color you don’t have a name for. A dozen images flash behind your eyes: stories you’ve told, stories you’ve abandoned, stories you haven’t yet dared to imagine.

The threads begin weaving themselves.

Not into fabric, not into rope—into a living tapestry suspended in the air: a shifting map of your experiences, your desires, your mistakes, your brilliance. Every moment of your life, even the ones you once thought meaningless, glimmer here as part of the pattern.

For a moment, you feel overwhelmed. The motion is chaotic, spiraling, unpredictable. But as you keep watching, a strange truth emerges:

The chaos has rhythm.

The randomness has intention.

The threads loop and braid and scatter, but somehow everything is connected. Your life has never been a straight line—it has always been a weave, and every thread has belonged.

You reach out again, gently.

This time, when your fingers brush the nearest strand, you feel something different—not memory or idea, but freedom. Permission to create without perfection. Permission to improvise. Permission to be unfinished.

A laugh escapes you—small, surprised, real. The threads respond instantly, flaring with brighter color before spiraling upward into the sky like joyful sparks.

When they fade, the air hums with quiet afterglow.

You understand: today is not about control. It is about creation. About trusting the threads that pull you. About letting your genius move without needing to justify itself.

As you leave the lake, you notice a single shimmering thread wrapped softly around your wrist. It dissolves the moment you look at it, but the warmth remains.

You walk back carrying a new, vibrant truth:

Your path is not something you follow.

It is something you weave.

number.title: The Force of Change
number.content: The number Eleven represents dissonance, resolution through change, and the stripping away of the non-essential. In Mayan cosmology, Eleven is a high-frequency energy that shakes the foundation to test its strength. It is not necessarily negative, but it is turbulent. Experientially, this energy feels like a strong wind or a sudden shift in plans. It breaks the static perfection of Ten to allow for higher growth. The shadow of Eleven can be chaos, but its light is liberation and the clearing of the path.

nawal.title: The Weaver of Time
nawal.content: B'atz' is the Nawal of the thread, the weaver, and the continuous unfolding of time itself. It represents the creative life force that spins the universe into existence. As the archetype of the artist and the organizer, B'atz' governs all forms of creative expression and the planning of time. In human experience, it manifests as the urge to create, to connect, and to celebrate. It is the thread of destiny. When aligned, B'atz' brings flow and beauty; when misaligned, it can lead to feeling tangled or anxious.

combined_energy.title: Unraveling to Reweave
combined_energy.content: The turbulent energy of Tone 11 meets the weaving power of B'atz' to create a day of 'Creative Chaos.' 11 B'atz' is the energy of the artist who decides to scrap the painting and start over. It represents the unraveling of old patterns so that a new, more beautiful design can be woven. This can feel unsettling, as B'atz' usually likes order, but 11 demands change. Today, allow your plans to be disrupted. If a thread snaps, don't panic; it was meant to break. This is a powerful day for improvisation, for jazz, for art that breaks the rules. The energy asks you to be flexible with your time and your creativity. You are being liberated from a pattern that was too small for you. Let the design change. The new tapestry that emerges from this chaos will be far more vibrant than the one you planned.
notes: Let go of your rigid schedule; allow spontaneity.
Experiment with a new artistic medium or method.
If a plan falls apart, look for the freedom in the rubble.
Re-evaluate how you spend your time; cut out the non-essential.
Trust the process of unweaving; it is part of creation.

days.horoscope:
Today brings creative lightning.

You may feel restless, inspired, nostalgic, energized—sometimes all at once. This is not a day to force discipline or rigid plans. It is a day to follow the thread: the idea that sparks, the memory that glows, the small joy that wants your attention.

Let your mind wander with purpose. Let your creativity be messy and true. Trust that the connections forming today are meaningful, even if they don’t make sense yet. A new pattern is weaving itself through your life.
days.affirmation: I follow the thread of inspiration and allow my creativity to flow freely, joyfully, and without perfection.
days.meditation:
Sit comfortably and imagine a single shimmering thread floating before you. With every inhale, see it brighten; with every exhale, see another thread join it. Let them form a small, shifting tapestry—your experiences woven into light.

Ask yourself: “What thread wants my attention today?” Allow an image, word, or feeling to appear.

Honor it. Follow it. Let it guide your steps.

Offer thanks to the ancient weavers and artists who understood that life is created, not controlled.

birthday.title: The Innovative Weaver
birthday.content:
To be born on 11 B'atz' is to be a revolutionary artist of life. You are the 'Weaver of Change'—a soul who knows the rules of time and creation well enough to break them beautifully. You are likely highly creative, with a mind that sees connections others miss. You don't just follow the pattern handed down by tradition; you invent new knots, new colors, new designs. Your life is a work of art in constant flux.

Your life path is one of liberation through creativity. You may struggle with restlessness or a sense that you don't fit into the standard timeline of society. The number 11 gives you a disruptive energy that challenges the status quo. Your challenge is to embrace your uniqueness and not fear the chaos of creation. You are here to show us that time is not a straight line, but a dance, and that we are free to change the steps whenever the music shifts.
birthday.image_prompt: Square image. A mystical stone carving of the Mayan glyph for B'atz' (Monkey/Thread) glowing with internal electric-blue and gold light against a dark obsidian background. Hovering directly above the glyph is the Mayan numeral 11: two glowing golden bars with one glowing dot above them. The style is ancient, tactile, and magical, emphasizing the texture of the stone and the luminescence of the symbols. No English text.

days.chapter:
You walk the path to the lake without hurry.

The forest is bright today—brighter than you remember seeing it. Light filters through the branches in long, gentle beams, illuminating the ground in soft, shifting patches. Every step feels familiar, but not routine. It feels like revisiting a place from childhood: the same, yet different because you are different.

When the lake comes into view, something new stands beside it.

A path.

Not a trail on the earth—an illuminated path made of soft, glowing stones hovering just above the water’s edge. Each stone shines with its own faint color: blue, gold, green, violet, rose. They stretch out in a gentle curve across the shoreline, not leading away from the lake but around it, forming a looping arc.

You step closer, and the stones respond.

Each one brightens when your shadow touches it, warming with a quiet hum, as if greeting you by name. You realize that the colors are not random. Each stone holds the memory of a day you have lived here.

The deep blue one echoes the stillness of the first day.
The pale rose one carries the trembling honesty of the second.
Another glimmers with dawn-gold, reflecting the in-between world of the third.
Others shimmer with knots loosened, power awakened, old selves released, clarity gained.

The path becomes a mirror—not of your face, but of your journey.

You walk slowly along the arc, touching each stone with the toe of your shoe or the palm of your hand. With every touch comes a small ripple of memory—not overwhelming, not heavy, just clear. You see the threads you’ve walked, the choices you’ve made, the moments that felt small at the time but now reveal themselves as turning points.

Halfway along the path, you pause.

The arc curves inward, offering a vantage point you hadn’t noticed before. From here, the lake looks different—wider, deeper, more whole. The reflections of the sky and trees merge seamlessly. The places where dawn split the world in two, where serpent-light coiled, where seeds glowed, all exist together in a single, fluid image.

For the first time, you see the entire story at once.

You realize the lake was never the destination.
It was the teacher.

Every return to the water has changed you. Every moment you sat, breathed, watched, untangled, witnessed, or listened has shaped the path beneath your feet.

You place your hand on the final stone.

It is brighter than the rest, shimmering with colors that shift too quickly to name—like a path that is still being written. When you touch it, a soft warmth spreads through your chest, not of nostalgia but of readiness.

You understand: reflection is not the end of the journey.
It is the moment you recognize that you are walking it consciously.

You look once more across the lake. It shines back at you—not as a mystery to solve, but as a companion that has walked every step with you.

When you leave the shore, the path of glowing stones slowly fades behind you, but something remains: the certainty that the way forward is alive, welcoming, and already unfolding beneath your feet.

number.title: The Crystal of Understanding
number.content: The number Twelve represents the grouping together, the village, and the understanding that comes from retrospection. In Mayan cosmology, Twelve is the energy of the 'Great Gathering.' It stabilizes the chaos of Eleven and integrates the lessons learned. Experientially, this energy feels inclusive, cooperative, and wise. It is a day to summarize, to discuss, and to connect the dots. The shadow of Twelve can be difficulty with individuality, but its light is the strength of the collective mind.

nawal.title: The Sacred Pathfinder
nawal.content: E' is the Nawal of the path, the road, and the journey. It represents the energy of movement, exploration, and the exchange of wisdom that comes from travel. E' governs the physical roads we walk as well as the spiritual destiny we are carving out. In human experience, it manifests as curiosity, restlessness, and a desire to see what lies beyond the horizon. It is the archetype of the Guide. When aligned, E' brings clarity of direction; when misaligned, it can lead to aimless wandering.

combined_energy.title: The Collective Journey
combined_energy.content: When the integrative understanding of Tone 12 meets the traveling energy of E', we arrive at a day of 'Shared Destiny.' 12 E' is the caravan. It represents the realization that we are not walking the path alone, but are part of a great migration of souls. Today is an excellent day to share your journey with others—tell your story, listen to theirs, and realize how your paths intersect. The energy supports summing up the lessons of your recent travels (inner or outer). It is a day to look at the map together and decide on the next leg of the trip. 12 E' brings a sense of belonging to the road; the path itself becomes the village. If you have felt lost, look to your companions for guidance today. The wisdom is in the group. Walk together, and the road will be easy.
notes: Share a story from your life journey with a group.
Reflect on the people who have walked with you so far.
Plan a group trip or a community outing.
Seek advice from a mentor or a 'guide' figure.
Acknowledge that every person you meet is a teacher on your path.

days.horoscope:
Today brings gentle clarity.

You may find yourself thinking about where you’ve been—not with regret, but with recognition. Patterns make sense. Threads connect. Experiences that once felt random now reveal their purpose.

This is a day for reflection, for walking your inner path with awareness. Trust the perspective you gain today. Let it guide your next steps with quiet confidence.
days.affirmation: I honor the journey I have walked, and I step forward with clarity, trust, and conscious intention.
days.meditation:
Sit comfortably and imagine a curved path of glowing stones forming around you. Each stone represents a moment of your recent journey.

Walk it slowly in your mind. Touch each one. Let its memory rise and fade without pressure or judgment.

When you reach the final stone, place your hand on it and silently say:
“My path is mine to walk, and I walk it with awareness.”

Offer gratitude to the ancient guardians of travelers, seekers, and wandering souls. Then gently return to your breath and open your eyes.

birthday.title: The Guide of the People
birthday.content:
To be born on 12 E' is to be a shepherd of souls on the journey of life. You are the 'Collective Compass'—someone who gathers experience from your travels and uses it to help the village find its way. You are likely a natural teacher, storyteller, or tour guide (literal or metaphorical). You love to explore, but you love it even more when you can share the discovery with others. You are not a solitary wanderer; you need the company of the caravan.

Your life path is one of gathering wisdom through movement and sharing it to build understanding. The number 12 gives you a gift for synthesis; you can take disparate experiences and weave them into a coherent map. Your challenge is to ensure that you don't lose your own direction while trying to herd the cats. You are here to remind us that while we each walk our own path, we are all heading home together.
birthday.image_prompt: Square image. A mystical stone carving of the Mayan glyph for E' (Path/Tooth/Ear) glowing with internal white and pale blue light against a dark obsidian background. Hovering directly above the glyph is the Mayan numeral 12: two glowing golden bars with two glowing dots above them. The style is ancient, tactile, and magical, emphasizing the texture of the stone and the luminescence of the symbols. No English text.

days.chapter:
The forest feels different today.

Not brighter, not darker—just more itself. Every sound is clear, every scent distinct, every leaf holding its place with the quiet confidence of something that knows it belongs. As you walk, the path beneath your feet seems to steady you, as if matching your stride with its own.

When you reach the lake, it is the calmest you have ever seen it.

No ripples,
no mist,
no shifting reflections—
only a surface so still it looks carved from polished stone. The sky rests on it comfortably, unbroken.

And then you notice something else.

Across the ground near the water’s edge, tall shapes rise slowly from the earth—columns made of light and shadow, woven with faint threads of gold. They are not physical, but they feel solid in a way your body understands. Thirteen of them stand in a soft arc around the lake, each one humming with a tone too low to hear but easy to feel.

You step closer.

As you approach the first pillar, your chest lifts, and a quiet awareness fills you: this pillar carries the beginning, the first spark.

The next holds breath.
The next dawn.
The next the net.
The serpent.
The ancestors.
The guardian.
The seeds.
The offering.
The truth.
The thread.
The path.

And the final pillar—the thirteenth—waits for you.

It is taller than the rest, luminous and warm, steady as an ancient tree. You feel its presence like a heartbeat outside your body. When you place your hand near it, the air thickens, not with intensity but with recognition.

This pillar is you.
Or rather, it is the shape you have been growing toward: the version of yourself built not from fear or longing, but from the courage you’ve shown in the smallest moments.

Memories rise, not as scenes but as sensations: the honesty of day two, the trembling of day three, the releasing of day four, the spark of day five, the relief of day six, the vision of day seven, the gratitude of day eight, the strength of day nine, the integrity of day ten, the creativity of day eleven, the perspective of day twelve.

None of these stand apart now.
They form a structure—an inner home.

You step into the center of the circle.

The pillars brighten, one by one, until the air around you glows like a sanctum built from every lesson you have lived. The lake reflects the pillars perfectly, doubling the image—above and below—like the spine of a world held in balance.

Your breath settles. Your shoulders drop. Something inside you clicks into place, quiet and sure.

You feel…upright.
Aligned.
True.

The pillars slowly dissolve back into the air, leaving no trace but a subtle warmth in the earth beneath your feet.

The lake remains still.
But you feel changed—not transformed into something new, but restored to something real.

When you walk away from the shore for the final time in this cycle, the forest does not feel like a place you visited.

It feels like a place within you that you can now return to at will.

And the lake, calm and silent behind you, remains—
not an ending, but a foundation.

number.title: The Ascension
number.content: The number Thirteen represents the completion of the cycle, the ascension to the next level, and the spirit world. In Mayan cosmology, Thirteen is the number of the ancestors and the highest vibration of time. It is the moment where the wave crashes onto the shore and recedes to become part of the ocean again. Experientially, this energy feels magical, heightened, and sometimes ungrounded. It is a day of profound intuition. The shadow of Thirteen can be a disconnection from reality, but its light is the ultimate transformation.

nawal.title: The Pillar of Light
nawal.content: Aj is the Nawal of the home, the cane, and the spinal column. It represents the principle of authority, leadership, and the upright growth of the cornstalk. Aj is the energy that holds up the roof—strong yet flexible. It governs the home, the family, and the community, emphasizing harmony and ethics. In human experience, Aj manifests as the desire to build a safe container for life. It is the staff of power. When aligned, Aj brings peace and stability; when misaligned, it can lead to rigidity.

combined_energy.title: Ascended Harmony
combined_energy.content: The Imox trecena concludes with the spiritual height of 13 Aj. Here, the ascension energy of Tone 13 meets the stabilizing pillar of Aj. This is a day of 'Spiritual Authority.' We have navigated the chaotic waters of Imox, and now we land on solid, holy ground. 13 Aj represents the ultimate home—the home within the spirit. It is a day to stand tall in your integrity, connected to both Heaven (13) and Earth (Aj). The energy is regal, peaceful, and complete. It suggests that true authority comes from spiritual alignment, not force. It is a perfect day to bless your home, to honor the 'elders' and ancestors, and to recognize the divine structure that supports your life. The dream of Imox has found its house. You have built a sanctuary in the storm. Stand in the doorway and welcome the light.
notes: Perform a house blessing or energetic clearing of your space.
Connect with the 'spiritual pillar' within you (your spine/chakras).
Honor the leaders and elders in your community.
Celebrate the completion of the 13-day cycle with a family meal.
Stand tall; feel your dignity and your connection to the divine.

days.horoscope:
Today brings completion—not as an ending, but as alignment. You may feel more centered, more grounded, or simply more aware of what truly matters.

This is a day to trust your inner structure. To act with dignity. To let truth shape your choices. You are standing on solid ground now.

Honor your growth. You earned this steadiness.
days.affirmation: I stand in my truth with clarity, dignity, and harmony. I honor the foundation I have built within myself.
days.meditation:
Sit comfortably and imagine thirteen pillars of light forming a gentle circle around you. Each one represents a lesson, a moment of growth, or a truth you’ve reclaimed.

Let them glow brighter, one by one, until you feel surrounded by a soft, steady sanctuary.

Place your hand on your heart and silently repeat:
“I am held. I am centered. I am aligned.”

Offer gratitude to the keepers of home, harmony, and sacred structure. Then let the pillars dissolve in your mind, leaving their steadiness in your body as you return to your day.

birthday.title: The Spiritual Anchor
birthday.content:
To be born on 13 Aj is to be a tower of spiritual strength. You are the 'Ascended Pillar'—a soul who brings the high frequency of the spirit world down into the very structure of earthly life. You have a commanding presence, yet you are gentle and flexible like the cornstalk. You are likely a natural leader, a spiritual teacher, or the rock of your family, someone who others lean on for support and wisdom. You embody the authority of the ancestors.

Your life path is one of bringing heaven to home. You are here to build structures (families, organizations, communities) that are aligned with divine law. The number 13 gives you a psychic edge and a connection to the mysteries, while Aj keeps you rooted in tradition and ethics. Your challenge is to stay grounded enough to be accessible to others, as your energy can sometimes feel 'otherworldly.' You are the staff that connects the earth to the sky.
birthday.image_prompt: Square image. A mystical stone carving of the Mayan glyph for Aj (Cornstalk/Cane) glowing with internal chocolate-brown and green light against a dark obsidian background. Hovering directly above the glyph is the Mayan numeral 13: two glowing golden bars with three glowing dots above them. The style is ancient, tactile, and magical, emphasizing the texture of the stone and the luminescence of the symbols. No English text.
